title: RVL 6768
overview: The Copeland Family fights to survive the end of the world in the face of natural disasters, supernatural creatures and a plague.

title: In Rats Alley
overview: The Copelands continue their search for their daughter, and encounter catastrophic solar flares, demons and beasts that were once only mythological.

title: In Our Empty Rooms
overview: While their daughter is taken in by a religious commune led by the mysterious Reverend Brother, the Copelands meet a man with the cure to the plague.

title: Fever of the Bone
overview: A horde of vicious feverheads and flesh-eating parasites force the Copeland's into a plague isolation unit.

title: A Clatter and a Chatter
overview: After accepting help from an old friend, a deathly omen torments Karen; the Copelands learn that no refuge is truly safe.

title: Madame Sosostris
overview: When the family splits up, Josh leads half the party to a nearby university to find a prophetic professor, while Karen leads the others to a nearby summer camp on a supply mission.

title: What the Thunder Said
overview: With volcanic Mount Rainier about to erupt, a mysterious figure tells the family that their only salvation lies back on the deadly mountain.

title: Here Is No Water but Only Rock
Hieronymo's Mad Againe
overview: When a family member shows plague symptoms, the Copelands go on a desperate hunt to find tetracycline.

title: Where the Dead Men Lost Their Bones
Now That We Talk of Dying
overview: Pursued by new enemies and racing against the clock, the Copelands need to find the man who holds all the answers.

title: Whispers of Immortality
overview: The end of the world has arrived, and the Copelands must use every ally and every bit of knowledge they possess to survive.
